## Install

```bash
npm install --global @shekohex/agent@{{PACKAGE_VERSION}} --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
```

```bash
pnpm add --global @shekohex/agent@{{PACKAGE_VERSION}} --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
```

```bash
bun add --global @shekohex/agent@{{PACKAGE_VERSION}} --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
```

```bash
yarn global add @shekohex/agent@{{PACKAGE_VERSION}} --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
```
